default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Yourco and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and email marketing initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/VZwePy8zxAAasbGQ-ynjFcyEHfzTtBGY?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production on track with 123 articles published; 10 more articles ready for review this week](https://fathom.video/share/VZwePy8zxAAasbGQ-ynjFcyEHfzTtBGY?tab=summary&timestamp=50.0)
  - [SEO performance showing positive trends; SOPs cluster performing best](https://fathom.video/share/VZwePy8zxAAasbGQ-ynjFcyEHfzTtBGY?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
  - [New strategy to broaden content focus on "frontline software" to target enterprise clients](https://fathom.video/share/VZwePy8zxAAasbGQ-ynjFcyEHfzTtBGY?tab=summary&timestamp=1421.0)
  - [Email marketing challenges discussed; outbound cold emailing still effective for some clients](https://fathom.video/share/VZwePy8zxAAasbGQ-ynjFcyEHfzTtBGY?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)

## Topics

### Content Production and SEO Performance

  - [123 articles published to date](https://fathom.video/share/VZwePy8zxAAasbGQ-ynjFcyEHfzTtBGY?tab=summary&timestamp=50.0)
  - [5 articles in Airtable ready for review](https://fathom.video/share/VZwePy8zxAAasbGQ-ynjFcyEHfzTtBGY?tab=summary&timestamp=55.0)
  - [5 articles edited and ready to publish](https://fathom.video/share/VZwePy8zxAAasbGQ-ynjFcyEHfzTtBGY?tab=summary&timestamp=58.0)
  - [10 more articles to be ready for review by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/VZwePy8zxAAasbGQ-ynjFcyEHfzTtBGY?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [SEO performance data slightly lagging due to Looker issue](https://fathom.video/share/VZwePy8zxAAasbGQ-ynjFcyEHfzTtBGY?tab=summary&timestamp=133.0)
  - [Overall blog traffic and new content performance showing positive trends](https://fathom.video/share/VZwePy8zxAAasbGQ-ynjFcyEHfzTtBGY?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
  - [SOPs cluster performing best, with employee texting having high CTR](https://fathom.video/share/VZwePy8zxAAasbGQ-ynjFcyEHfzTtBGY?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [Steady growth in backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/VZwePy8zxAAasbGQ-ynjFcyEHfzTtBGY?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)

### Content Optimization Suggestions

  - [Interlink new content with existing high-performing resources pages](https://fathom.video/share/VZwePy8zxAAasbGQ-ynjFcyEHfzTtBGY?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
  - [Create checklists and templates for SOP and internal communication content](https://fathom.video/share/VZwePy8zxAAasbGQ-ynjFcyEHfzTtBGY?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
  - [Implement cluster approach for publishing new content under resources](https://fathom.video/share/VZwePy8zxAAasbGQ-ynjFcyEHfzTtBGY?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
  - [Align SEO strategy with product roadmap (e.g., scheduling feature)](https://fathom.video/share/VZwePy8zxAAasbGQ-ynjFcyEHfzTtBGY?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)

### Email Marketing Strategy

  - [Current B2B tracking identifies \~30% of website traffic](https://fathom.video/share/VZwePy8zxAAasbGQ-ynjFcyEHfzTtBGY?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)
  - [Plan to integrate with Clay Depot and HubSpot for better targeting](https://fathom.video/share/VZwePy8zxAAasbGQ-ynjFcyEHfzTtBGY?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
  - [Challenge: Small list of \~50 qualified leads per month](https://fathom.video/share/VZwePy8zxAAasbGQ-ynjFcyEHfzTtBGY?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Focus on personalization and two-sequence approach (initial + follow-up)](https://fathom.video/share/VZwePy8zxAAasbGQ-ynjFcyEHfzTtBGY?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)
  - [Bottleneck: CRM data hygiene and implementation complexity](https://fathom.video/share/VZwePy8zxAAasbGQ-ynjFcyEHfzTtBGY?tab=summary&timestamp=789.0)

### Outbound Email Campaign Performance

  - [Mixed results: Some clients seeing success (e.g., 25-30 demos booked/month)](https://fathom.video/share/VZwePy8zxAAasbGQ-ynjFcyEHfzTtBGY?tab=summary&timestamp=862.0)
  - [Yourco experiencing challenges despite good deliverability](https://fathom.video/share/VZwePy8zxAAasbGQ-ynjFcyEHfzTtBGY?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Hypothesis: Content or audience segmentation may need adjustment](https://fathom.video/share/VZwePy8zxAAasbGQ-ynjFcyEHfzTtBGY?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Suggestion: Focus on value proposition rather than over-personalization](https://fathom.video/share/VZwePy8zxAAasbGQ-ynjFcyEHfzTtBGY?tab=summary&timestamp=1045.0)
  - [Key metrics for successful campaign: 45% open rate, \~20% conversion rate](https://fathom.video/share/VZwePy8zxAAasbGQ-ynjFcyEHfzTtBGY?tab=summary&timestamp=1180.0)

### Broadening Content Strategy for Enterprise Clients

  - [Current SEO/SEM efforts primarily attracting small/medium businesses](https://fathom.video/share/VZwePy8zxAAasbGQ-ynjFcyEHfzTtBGY?tab=summary&timestamp=1405.0)
  - [New focus: Target enterprise HR managers with broader topics](https://fathom.video/share/VZwePy8zxAAasbGQ-ynjFcyEHfzTtBGY?tab=summary&timestamp=1421.0)
  - [Explore content around mass hiring, programmatic job postings](https://fathom.video/share/VZwePy8zxAAasbGQ-ynjFcyEHfzTtBGY?tab=summary&timestamp=1484.0)
  - [Include Yourco product information within broader topic content](https://fathom.video/share/VZwePy8zxAAasbGQ-ynjFcyEHfzTtBGY?tab=summary&timestamp=1589.0)
  - [Position Yourco as "frontline software intelligence" solution](https://fathom.video/share/VZwePy8zxAAasbGQ-ynjFcyEHfzTtBGY?tab=summary&timestamp=1676.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Develop proposal for expanding content clusters, focusing on "frontline software" angle](https://fathom.video/share/VZwePy8zxAAasbGQ-ynjFcyEHfzTtBGY?tab=summary&timestamp=1812.0)
  - [Research and present 4-5 new cluster ideas for next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/VZwePy8zxAAasbGQ-ynjFcyEHfzTtBGY?tab=summary&timestamp=1816.0)
  - [Continue optimizing existing content and interlinking strategy](https://fathom.video/share/VZwePy8zxAAasbGQ-ynjFcyEHfzTtBGY?tab=summary&timestamp=1772.0)
